name: Charles Fambrough
description: American jazz bassist, composer and producer (1950–2011)
abstract: Charles Fambrough (August 25, 1950 – January 1, 2011) was an American jazz bassist, composer and record producer from Philadelphia. Having played together in a previous (cover) band Fambrough joined Grover Washington Jr.'s band in 1970.

about_quotes.speaker: Branford Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: With Wynton on trumpet, Bobby Watson on alto, Billy Pierce tenor, Charles Fambrough on bass, James Williams on piano and Bu, Art Blakey on drums.
about_quotes.doc_title: Branford Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Tyner McCoy
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] And then Charles Fambrough on bass... And this one you had George Adams, Joe Ford, Charles Fambrough, and Sonship.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tyner McCoy — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
